generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when we stood together against the threats of the past? Our alliances have kept us safe for decades. Some politicians want to weaken these bonds, but we can't let that happen. Our veterans, our families, and our communities depend on the strength we've built together. Let's not forget the lessons of history - unity in defense is our best guarantee of peace. #StandWithAllies #NationalSecurity
